creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Hi!

Recent commits to lang/perl5.* ports made it impossible to build perl5 using FreeBSD 11.4 and this complicates source upgrade path greatly: modern network connectivity often requires support for modern TLS versions provided by the port security/openssl.

It is impossible to build/upgrade openssl-1.1.1n without upgrading Perl beforehand. We ought make upgrade path as easy as possible.

Please consider to restore FreeBSD 11 support for lang/perl5.* ports backing out corresponding changes.
